# gald3r System Instructions for GitHub Copilot

The following rules apply to every Copilot session in this repository.
They are automatically generated from this project's gald3r always-apply rule files.

> **STUB**: Run `scripts/generate_copilot_instructions.ps1` to populate this file
> with your project's installed rules. This placeholder ships with the template
> and will be replaced on first session start when Copilot is configured.

---

## Setup

After installing gald3r and selecting your platforms, run:

```powershell
.\scripts\generate_copilot_instructions.ps1
```

Or it will be auto-generated by the session-start hook when GitHub Copilot is active.
